title: EU Cloud vs US Giants: A New European Cloud Option? #shorts
summary: The video discusses major cloud providers expanding data centers across Europe and raises the question of whether Europe should build its own cloud infrastructure to reduce dependency on foreign providers. The piece frames this as part of broader discussions on digital sovereignty and technological independence.
writeup: This short covers major cloud providers expanding data centers across Europe and asks whether Europe should build its own cloud infrastructure to cut dependency on foreign providers. It frames the question as part of broader debates on digital sovereignty and technological independence. The takeaway is that the growth of US-based cloud capacity in Europe is what motivates the case for a European cloud option.
